message:
🌱 Add News link to Community dropdown in navbar (#1169)

Adds a direct link to the News page in the Community dropdown so users
can discover announcements without scrolling to the top-level News section.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,6 +104,7 @@ nav:
       - Sign-off and Signing Contributions: kubestellar/pr-signoff.md
   - Community:
     - Get Involved: Community/_index.md
+    - News: news/index.md
     - Contact Us:
         - Mailing List: https://kubestellar.io/join_us
         - Community Meeting Agenda (join mailing list first): https://kubestellar.io/agenda
